rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Calc DLL Load
id: b47b9cc3-6f9a-4a58-a669-5e5e126514b1
status: experimental
description: Detects Windows 7 calc.exe loading DLLs from suspicious or abnormal file
  paths.
references:
- https://www.trellix.com/en-us/about/newsroom/stories/research/demystifying-qbot-malware.html
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/19
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1574
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \calc.exe
  filter:
    ImageLoaded|startswith:
    - C:\Windows\System32
    - C:\Windows\SysWOW64
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
